titleStmt.title: SII 24.225: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 225. (A.R. No. 29 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers a grant of land to the sabhā of Jagadēkavīra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in exchange for 3 vēli of land required for the temple of Kōdaṇḍarāma-perumāḷ in the new colony Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (vide No. 223). The record is dated in the 11th year and the 170th day of the king, corresponding to A.D. 1313. Sundara Pāṇḍya Kāḷiṅgarāyar figures as one of the signatories in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ jagadekavira ccaturvedi maṅkalattu sabhai
yārkkup perumāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyilil nam perāl vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu nāyaṉār kodaṇḍarāmap perumāḷ koyilukkum Akaravāstuvukkum vāstu ceṣattukkuñ cuṟṟuk kulaikkum perumāḷ tirumuṭikkuṟaikku Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil tirukkuṟaippaṟṟilum pāṭakat tāḻvāṉ paṟṟilum palarpakkalilum vilaikoṇṭanilam
niṅkalāka maṉṟacca viḷākattu tirunāmattukkāṇi paṟṟilum Oṭamuṭaiyār veṭṭip (p)eṟṟilum pukunta nilam muvelikkut talaimāṟāka taṅkaḷurppiṭākai jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻanallūrk kaṭṭaḷaiyil Araiyar vayaliṟ pantaṟkā(l)lukkut teṟku Avaṉinārāyaṇa vāykkālukkuk kiḻakku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil kār maṟuviḷaiyum nilattile muveli nilam patiṉoṉṟāvatu kārmutaluk kuṭuttom . Innilam
viṭṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyilil tiruppatiyārkkicaiyak kaṭamaiyum Iṟuttuk kuṭimaiyuñ ceyyum Innilam muvelikkum Oṭṭuppaṭiyāluḷḷa nel lum pacāṉamun taṅkaḷ peril kaḻittapaṭiye celavu koḷḷavum Ippaṭikku Iv volai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu candrādityavaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭ ṭuvittuk kuṭukka § Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāḷiṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § yāṇṭu 10 1 nāḷ 100 7 10 tu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
